# Calculator

Perform mathematical calculations including basic arithmetic,
algebra, and unit conversions.

## Usage

Ask the agent:
- "What is 15% of 230?"
- "Convert 72°F to Celsius"
- "Calculate the compound interest on $10,000 at 5% for 3 years"

## Supported Operations

- Basic arithmetic (+, -, *, /)
- Percentages
- Unit conversions (temperature, distance, weight)
- Compound interest
- Basic statistics (mean, median, mode)

## Notes

All calculations are performed locally. No external API calls are made.
